name: Ember of the Void
description: Notes This is an Antinomy Gear item.
effects: On Taking Damage: When health drops below 75%, spawns a void spirit who deals damage for 5 seconds Void Spirit Effect: Deals 100-150 armor piercing damage within 4.5 squares every 0.6 seconds, click or hold your Summon Control button to move it Cooldown: 25 seconds On Taking Damage: When health drops below 50%, ATT Boost (+10 ATT) for 10 seconds Cooldown: 20 seconds
